pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 features, failing to leverage or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the Java version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce bytecode compatibility with the target JDK version specified in properties.
